data.body:
## Description

**What**: Remove v2 .tickets/ paths-ignore patterns from CI workflows and example config files.
**Why**: The v2 .tickets/ directory no longer exists; these patterns are dead configuration.
**Scope**:
- IN: .github/workflows/ci.yml (remove .tickets/ from paths-ignore on lines 15, 21), examples/ci.example.yml (remove .tickets/ patterns), examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml (remove .tickets/ exclude patterns)
- OUT: Scripts, hooks, docs, tests

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, no CI workflow or example file contains .tickets/ path patterns. Satisfies: No references to .tickets/ directory remain in CI workflows or examples
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Verify no other paths-ignore entries are accidentally removed when editing ci.yml
